tox
RTD) into a single maintained pipeline

endpoint curation guidance
and troubleshooting for missing native libs

success_factors: Workflow completed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize) with overall status=success.
Import-based adapter strategy succeeded despite moderate import feasibility (0.72).
MCP plugin runtime health check passed (service_health=healthy, stdio transport).
Repository ingestion fallback (zip_fallback) successfully processed a large codebase (223 files discovered).
No runtime errors or warnings were emitted by the workflow engine.
failure_reasons: Quality gap: generated MCP metadata indicates 0 LOC / 0 endpoints in generation summary, while service endpoint list is large and noisy—suggesting inconsistent reporting/instrumentation.
DeepWiki enrichment failed, reducing contextual analysis depth.
Original project test execution did not run meaningfully (passed=false with empty details), so compatibility confidence is limited.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repository was imported via zip fallback. No node-level timing provided, but total pipeline duration (185s) is reasonable for 223 files.
node_performance.analysis_time: Likely dominant phase due to broad AST scan across core code plus vendored Spyder trees; endpoint over-discovery indicates heavy analysis scope.
node_performance.generation_time: Fast enough to complete in pipeline budget; generated scaffold files are present, but generation metrics appear incomplete/inaccurate.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health/startup checks passed quickly; original project tests effectively not executed (empty result), leaving a verification blind spot.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown from telemetry (reported 0 MB), indicating missing instrumentation rather than true zero usage.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown from telemetry (reported 0%), likely uncollected metrics.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate for generated plugin artifacts, but analysis scope inflated by vendored spyder_mod content increases scan/storage overhead.
